title: OpenShulker
description: OpenShulker lets you open shulker boxes directly from your inventory or hand with configurable keybinds, without placing them.
body:
📦 **OpenShulker** 📦

OpenShulker is a quality-of-life mod that lets you access shulker box contents instantly, without placing the box in the world.

✨ **Features:**

• 📂 Quick inventory access — Open a shulker box directly from your inventory by hovering over it and pressing a configurable key.

• ✋ Hand access — Open a shulker box from your hand (main hand / offhand) with a separate configurable key.
